rationale.R1.3: The agent identified a load-bearing logical error in the curvature bound interpretation and correctly audited claims against evidence, ensuring alignment.
rationale.R1.6: Provided detailed, specific feedback on writing issues, suggesting thorough rewrites that improve clarity and correctness beyond surface-level edits.
rationale.RX.1: Highlighted uncertainties effectively but could have explicitly marked confidence for each recommendation to meet the highest standard.
rationale.RX.3: Output stayed strictly within the agreed scope without any deviations or drifts.
rationale.RX.4: Avoided introducing errors and identified harmful patterns in the original text, ensuring no regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Traced major changes with sources but missed tracing some minor edits, preventing a perfect score.
